title: Gig Drivers, Real Claims: Understanding Insurance in the Rideshare & Delivery Era
body:
Gig Drivers, Real Claims: Understanding Insurance in the Rideshare & Delivery Era

As the gig economy redefines mobility and on-demand services, you must stay sharp on the coverage landscape. This webinar examines how rideshare and delivery platforms affect traditional insurance models, highlights the complexities of platform-provided policies, and identifies key liability and claim issues. Discover the nuances between personal and commercial auto coverage, and explore solutions like hybrid policies, endorsements, and broader protections including disability and cyber. With real-world scenarios and updated industry insight, this webinar equips you to better serve clients working or interacting with gig platforms.

Pricing

Webinar Details

Gig Drivers, Real Claims: Understanding Insurance in the Rideshare & Delivery Era

Rideshare and delivery apps have transformed transportation and gig work—and raised new insurance questions. Explore how these platforms impact coverage, from personal auto policy exclusions to hybrid and commercial solutions. Understand what’s required, what’s provided, and what’s missing, so you can guide clients with confidence through the evolving landscape of gig economy risk.

Topics

  • Explore the impact of rideshare platforms on the taxi industry, public transit, and insurance regulation
  • Examine how different types of gig work—from carsharing to errand delivery—create unique coverage challenges
  • Understand claim issues involving driver injury, liability, and incidents across various stages of app use
  • Learn the distinctions between personal, commercial, and platform-provided insurance and where coverage gaps arise
  • Build tailored insurance solutions with endorsements, hybrid policies, and additional protections for gig workers
